BirthdayCard.title: Birthdaycard
BirthdayCard.description: A customized memory card left for the birthday celebrant.

projectId.description: Optional reference linking this card to a specific celebration project.

imageUrl.description: Optional base64 or public image url.

presetColor.description: The custom aesthetic layout color preset identifier.

authorId.description: UID of the user who posted this card.

authorName.description: Full display name of the card creater.

authorEmail.description: Email address of the card creator.

Setting.title: Setting
Setting.description: Global customization setting such as the current celebrated name.

updatedBy.description: UID of the user who changed this setting.

orbitDescription.description: Optional memory orbit block description details.

vercelDeployUrl.description: Optional direct link to the deployed Vercel live celebration page.

vercelProjectName.description: Optional unique project slug associated with Vercel deployment.

/birthday_content/{cardId}.description: Collection storing all memory wishes left by users.
